message:
test: add coverage for orphaned database detection and cleanup (gt-lei5p)

Add tests for FindOrphanedDatabases, collectReferencedDatabases,
RemoveDatabase, ListDatabases, and DatabaseExists in doltserver package.
Add tests for DoltOrphanedDatabaseCheck in doctor package including
the fix path. Covers the exact bug scenario (beads_wy orphan alongside
wyvern) to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
